mapper.insert: insert into campus_user_rating(order_id, buyer_id, seller_id, score, comment, create_time) values(#{orderId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{score}, #{comment}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select count(1) from campus_user_rating where order_id = #{orderId}
select IFNULL(AVG(score), 5.0) from campus_user_rating where seller_id = #{sellerId}
